# Endpoint signature (cycles.py L540-720, condensed). The full code is
# in src/forest_soul_forge/daemon/routers/cycles.py — this is the SHAPE.

from pydantic import BaseModel

class CycleDecisionIn(BaseModel):
    action: str           # 'approve' | 'deny' | 'counter'
    note: str | None = None
    delete_branch: bool = False  # only honored for deny

class CycleDecisionOut(BaseModel):
    cycle_id:         str
    branch:           str
    head_sha:         str
    action:           str
    audit_seq:        int
    merge_commit_sha: str | None
    branch_deleted:   bool
    detail:           str

@router.post(
    '/agents/{instance_id}/cycles/{cycle_id}/decision',
    response_model=CycleDecisionOut,
)
def cycle_decision(
    instance_id: str,
    cycle_id:    str,
    body:        CycleDecisionIn,
    request:     Request,
    registry:    Registry      = Depends(get_registry),
    audit:       AuditChain    = Depends(get_audit_chain),
    write_lock:  threading.RLock = Depends(get_write_lock),
):
    # 404: agent not in registry
    try:
        agent = registry.get_agent(instance_id)
    except UnknownAgentError:
        raise HTTPException(404, detail=f'agent {instance_id!r} not found')

    # 400: cycle_id pattern (defense against path traversal)
    if not re.match(r'^cycle-\d+$', cycle_id):
        raise HTTPException(400, detail=f'invalid cycle_id {cycle_id!r}')
    branch = f'experimenter/{cycle_id}'

    # 404: workspace not provisioned
    repo = _resolve_workspace_path(request)
    if repo is None:
        raise HTTPException(404, detail='experimenter workspace not provisioned')

    # 404: branch doesn't exist
    rc, _, _ = _run_git(repo, 'rev-parse', '--verify', branch)
    if rc != 0:
        raise HTTPException(404, detail=f'branch {branch!r} not found in workspace')

    # Capture HEAD sha before any mutation.
    rc, head_sha_full, _ = _run_git(repo, 'rev-parse', branch)
    head_sha = (head_sha_full or '').strip()[:12] or 'unknown'

    with write_lock:
        merge_commit_sha: str | None = None
        branch_deleted = False
        detail_msg = ''

        if body.action == 'approve':
            _run_git(repo, 'checkout', 'main')
            rc, mout, merr = _run_git(
                repo, 'merge', '--no-ff', branch,
                '-m', f'Merge experimenter/{cycle_id} (operator-approved)',
            )
            if rc != 0:
                _run_git(repo, 'merge', '--abort')
                raise HTTPException(
                    409,
                    detail=f'merge of {branch!r} produced a conflict; aborted.',
                )
            rc, sha_out, _ = _run_git(repo, 'rev-parse', 'HEAD')
            if rc == 0:
                merge_commit_sha = sha_out.strip()[:12]
            detail_msg = f'approved: merged {branch} into main'

        elif body.action == 'deny':
            if body.delete_branch:
                rc, _, _ = _run_git(repo, 'branch', '-D', branch)
                if rc == 0:
                    branch_deleted = True
                    detail_msg = f'denied: branch {branch} deleted from workspace.'
                else:
                    detail_msg = f'denied: tag recorded but branch delete failed.'
            else:
                detail_msg = f'denied: outcome tagged; branch {branch} preserved.'

        elif body.action == 'counter':
            detail_msg = 'counter-proposed: note recorded in audit chain.'

        # Single audit event for all three actions.
        entry = audit.append(
            'experimenter_cycle_decision',
            {
                'instance_id':      instance_id,
                'cycle_id':         cycle_id,
                'branch':           branch,
                'head_sha':         head_sha,
                'action':           body.action,
                'note':             body.note,
                'merge_commit_sha': merge_commit_sha,
                'branch_deleted':   branch_deleted,
            },
            agent_dna=agent.dna,
        )
        audit_seq = entry.seq

    return CycleDecisionOut(
        cycle_id=cycle_id,
        branch=branch,
        head_sha=head_sha,
        action=body.action,
        audit_seq=audit_seq,
        merge_commit_sha=merge_commit_sha,
        branch_deleted=branch_deleted,
        detail=detail_msg,
    )

# Existing pattern from tests/unit/test_cycles_router.py L100-125.
# Note: existing _build_client uses allow_write_endpoints=False which
# works for GET tests but will give you audit_chain=None for write
# tests. Either redefine with True, or import the existing one and
# accept the limitation (some assertions may need to skip).

import subprocess
from pathlib import Path
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient

from forest_soul_forge.daemon.app import build_app
from forest_soul_forge.daemon.config import DaemonSettings
from forest_soul_forge.registry import Registry
from tests.unit.conftest import seed_stub_agent

API_TOKEN = 'test-token-cycles'
INSTANCE_ID = 'agent_cycles'


def _git(repo: Path, *args: str) -> None:
    """Run a git command in repo; raise loudly on non-zero rc."""
    result = subprocess.run(
        ['git', '-C', str(repo), *args],
        capture_output=True, text=True, check=False,
    )
    if result.returncode != 0:
        raise RuntimeError(
            f'git {" ".join(args)} failed: rc={result.returncode} '
            f'stdout={result.stdout!r} stderr={result.stderr!r}'
        )


def _build_workspace(workspace: Path) -> None:
    """Build a temp git repo with main + experimenter/cycle-1
    (with CYCLE_REPORT.md) + experimenter/cycle-2 (no report).
    """
    workspace.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
    _git(workspace, 'init', '-b', 'main')
    _git(workspace, 'config', 'user.email', 'test@example.com')
    _git(workspace, 'config', 'user.name', 'Test User')
    _git(workspace, 'commit', '--allow-empty', '-m', 'initial commit')

    # cycle-1: cycle with a CYCLE_REPORT.md
    _git(workspace, 'checkout', '-b', 'experimenter/cycle-1')
    (workspace / 'feature_a.py').write_text(
        "def hello():\n    return 'cycle 1'\n", encoding='utf-8',
    )
    (workspace / 'CYCLE_REPORT.md').write_text(
        '# Cycle 1 Report\n\ntest_outcome: passed\n',
        encoding='utf-8',
    )
    _git(workspace, 'add', '.')
    _git(workspace, 'commit', '-m', 'cycle 1: add feature_a')

    # cycle-2: no report, possibly conflicting if main also touches feature_a
    _git(workspace, 'checkout', 'main')
    _git(workspace, 'checkout', '-b', 'experimenter/cycle-2')
    (workspace / 'feature_b.py').write_text(
        "def world():\n    return 'cycle 2'\n", encoding='utf-8',
    )
    _git(workspace, 'add', '.')
    _git(workspace, 'commit', '-m', 'cycle 2: add feature_b (wip)')

    _git(workspace, 'checkout', 'main')


def _build_client(tmp_path: Path) -> tuple[TestClient, Path]:
    """Stand up the daemon with an experimenter workspace + seed agent.
    NOTE existing version uses allow_write_endpoints=False — for cycle 2
    you likely need True so audit chain is initialized.
    """
    workspace = tmp_path / 'workspace'
    _build_workspace(workspace)

    settings = DaemonSettings(
        registry_db_path=tmp_path / 'registry.sqlite',
        artifacts_dir=tmp_path / 'souls',
        audit_chain_path=tmp_path / 'audit.jsonl',
        experimenter_workspace_path=workspace,
        api_token=API_TOKEN,
        allow_write_endpoints=False,  # FLIP TO True FOR CYCLE 2!
    )
    reg = Registry.bootstrap(settings.registry_db_path)
    seed_stub_agent(reg, INSTANCE_ID)
    reg.close()

    app = build_app(settings)
    return TestClient(app), workspace
